result.stdout:
Description:
  Piper Plus TTS — C# CLI

Usage:
  PiperPlus.Cli [options]

Options:
  -m, --model <model>                                        Path to .onnx model file, or model name/alias for auto-download
  -c, --config <config>                                      Path to config.json (auto-detected if omitted)
  -f, --output-file, --output_file <output_file>             Output WAV file path ('-' for stdout)
  -d, --output-dir, --output_dir <output_dir>                Output directory (default: current directory) [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-piperplus.cli-0.1.0-0ea43e9251be4372ba79088c15d63b89]
  --output-raw, --output_raw                                 Output raw PCM int16 to stdout (no WAV header)
  -s, --speaker <speaker>                                    Speaker ID (default: 0) [default: 0]
  --noise-scale, --noise_scale <noise_scale>                 Generator noise scale (default: 0.667) [default: 0.667]
  --length-scale, --length_scale <length_scale>              Phoneme length scale (default: 1.0) [default: 1]
  --noise-w, --noise_w <noise_w>                             Duration predictor noise (default: 0.8) [default: 0.8]
  --sentence-silence, --sentence_silence <sentence_silence>  Seconds of silence after each sentence (default: 0.2) [default: 0.2]
  -t, --text <text>                                          Text to synthesize (alternative to JSONL stdin input)
  --language <language>                                      Language for --text mode: ja, en, zh, es, fr, pt, or combined (e.g. ja-en-zh-es-fr-pt) (default: ja) [default: ja]
  --json-input                                               Interpret stdin as JSONL
  --debug                                                    Enable DEBUG logging to stderr
  -q, --quiet                                                Disable all logging
  --version                                                  Show version and exit
  --use-cuda                                                 Use CUDA execution provider
  --gpu-device-id <gpu-device-id>                            CUDA GPU device ID [default: 0]
  --phoneme_silence <phoneme_silence>                        Phoneme silence: '<phoneme> <seconds>'
  --raw-phonemes                                             Treat input as phonemes (not text)
  --streaming                                                Stream raw PCM int16 to stdout
  --output-timing <output-timing>                            Output phoneme timing to file
  --timing-format <timing-format>                            Timing format: json or tsv [default: json]
  --custom-dict <custom-dict>                                Custom dictionary files (comma-separated)
  --espeak_data <espeak_data>                                espeak-ng data path (ignored in C# CLI)
  --tashkeel_model <tashkeel_model>                          libtashkeel model (ignored in C# CLI)
  --test-mode                                                Skip ONNX inference (CI testing)
  --list-models <list-models>                                List available models (optionally filter by language code)
  --download-model <download-model>                          Download a model by name
  --model-dir <model-dir>                                    Model download directory
  -?, -h, --help                                             Show help and usage information
  --version                                                  Show version information

  -s, --speaker <speaker>                                    Speaker ID (default: 0) [default: 0]

  -q, --quiet                                                Disable all logging
  --version                                                  Show version and exit
  --use-cuda                                                 Use CUDA execution provider

  --version                                                  Show version information
